summary.finance: KOSPI opens significantly higher at 5,551.69, driven by optimism regarding the potential end of the Middle East conflict.
summary.art: BAMA 2026 continues at BEXCO with steady visitor interest.

market_highlights: KOSPI index trading near the 5,500 level.
Significant gains attributed to renewed peace hopes.
Market sentiment bullish following earlier 8% surge on April 1.
art_highlights: BAMA 2026 (Busan) ongoing until April 5 at BEXCO.
